name: ExtensionConceptMap_Group_Element_Target_Property
title: R5: Property value for the source -> target mapping (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.property` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ConceptMap.group.element.target.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ConceptMap.group.element.target.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.property` has a context of ConceptMap.group.element.target based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ConceptMap`.
Element `ConceptMap.group.element.target.property` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
